name: backend
description: AI Campaign Competitive Analyzer - Backend API

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:dbpush && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/server.ts
scripts.start: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && node dist/server.js
scripts.worker:analysis: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:dbpush && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ts-node-dev --respawn --transpile-only src/workers/analysis-worker.ts
scripts.worker:analysis:prod: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy && node dist/workers/analysis-worker.js
